title: Mouse Tweaks x ItemLocks Compat
description: Adds compatibility between ItemLocks mod and Mouse Tweaks
body:
# Mouse Tweaks x Item Locks Compatibility

Perfect seamless interaction between Item Locks and Mouse Tweaks mods. Keeps your locked items truly protected, even with advanced inventory management.

![Showcase do mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e106fd0fffa6bd926d85a92ca70731b5c38bb6b3.gif)

## The Problem

Item Locks locks your items to prevent accidental moves. Mouse Tweaks provides quick inventory organization through shift-clicking. But they didn't understand each other,Mouse Tweaks would move your locked items anyway.

## The Solution

This compatibility mod ensures **Mouse Tweaks respects Item Locks completely**. Locked items stay locked while you enjoy fast inventory management everywhere else.

## How It Works

- **Drag Prevention** - Locked items can't be dragged by Mouse Tweaks
- **Click Blocking** - Direct clicks on locked items are blocked as a safety layer
- **Keybind Respect** - Honors Item Locks' bypass keybind for intentional unlocking
- **Seamless Integration** - Works automatically with both mods

## Compatibility

- Requires: [**Item Locks**](https://modrinth.com/mod/itemlocks) and [**Mouse Tweaks**](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks)
- No configuration needed. just install and it works!
